specification.function: 1. Time Unit: 1.0 unit = 1.0 second. 2. Generates a pallet every 'pallet_interval'. 3. Each pallet is assigned a unique 'pallet_id' and an absolute 'expiration_time' = (current_time + 'pallet_expiration_time'). 4. Also records the 'generation_time' for later latency calculation.

model_init_args.name: name
model_init_args.structure: Unique name of the model instance

model_init_args.name: pallet_expiration_time
model_init_args.structure: Relative duration until a pallet expires in queue

protocol.description: Sends a pallet dictionary to [PalletQueue: pallet_in] every pallet_interval.
